raw_consumer_statement: Several fraudulent charges were made to my account with mine & my wife cards. They apparently sent us new cards and our mailbox had been broken into. We provided XXXX XXXX with the postmaster 's investigative reports. They resolved the charges from my wifes card but have ignored mine. When I called several times, they said that I had no outstanding balance and everything has been cleared but the charges are still showing up and they have thit my credit score. I've called them regarding this issue at least 6 times. Has been going on for 10 months now. The last call I made, the rep said that I needed to email someone and said she couldn't help me. I sent that email several emails explaining everything and have received no response. It is the Home Depot card through Citi Bank.
